name: HireMe
description: A comprehensive hiring platform that connects employers with skilled candidates through AI-powered job matching, skill assessments, and integrated video interviews with collaborative code editor.
features: Smart Job matching based on skills and experience
Real-time video interviews with built-in code editor

name: The Quiet Game
description: An innovative multiplayer game where players use sign language instead of drawing to act out words. Features real-time video streaming, live leaderboards, and difficulty-based word categories.
features: Multiplayer room system with live chat
achievement: 🏆 Winner of Judges Choice award at "UIU HackDay" Hackathon

name: Real-Time Video Calling IDE
description: A Discord-inspired web application combining video calling with a professional online code editor. Supports multi-language code execution and real-time collaboration.
features: Professional Monaco code editor (VS Code engine)
folder: Real-Time Video Calling with built-in Coding IDE

name: Hospital Management System
description: A comprehensive hospital management system streamlining patient records, appointment booking, prescription management, and administrative tasks.

name: Air Quality Prediction
description: A machine learning model that predicts air quality levels using historical environmental data, helping communities plan for poor air quality days.

name: Student Dropout Prediction
description: A predictive analytics solution that identifies students at risk of dropping out, enabling educational institutions to provide timely intervention and support.
